'''Orma Hundeen''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]]. Along with [[Zeela Nall]], [[Nuri Pravada]], [[Sheyne Tyndos]], and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], she went on a mission on [[Elerion]] to recover the [[Holocube/Legends|holocube]] map containing the location of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] bases from [[Nescan Tal'yo]], [[Hermos (droid)|Hermos]], and [[Gogol (owner)|Gogol]].
